---
id: listar-eventos-disparados-de-um-webhook
title: "Listar eventos disparados de um webhook"
description: "Retorna a lista paginada de eventos disparados para o webhook, com summary das tentativas de entrega. Filtros opcionais: status, eventType, from, to."
sidebar_label: "Listar eventos disparados de um webhook"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: notax-pay/notaxpay-api-v-1
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Listar eventos disparados de um webhook"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/webhook/{id}/events"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retorna a lista paginada de eventos disparados para o webhook, com summary das tentativas de entrega. Filtros opcionais: status, eventType, from, to.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
